acceptance_criteria.description: TypeScript compiles with no errors after adding Ring 1 and Ring 2 prompt templates
Ring 1 prompt templates cover all six semantic checks R1-I10 through R1-I15
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that ring1.ts exports six prompt-building functions for R1-I10 (spec coverage), R1-I11 (out-of-scope consistency), R1-I12 (design decision coherence), R1-I13 (dependency completeness), R1-I14 (decomposition coverage, conditional on decomposed status), R1-I15 (cross-implementation contradiction). Each function must take (documentContent: string, additionalContext?: string) and return a string. Each prompt must ask exactly one question and instruct the LLM to return JSON with check, verdict, and issues fields. Verdict: PASS if all six are present with correct signatures and output format instructions; FAIL otherwise.

acceptance_criteria.description: Ring 2 prompt templates cover all six quality rubrics R2-I10 through R2-I15
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify that ring2.ts exports six prompt-building functions for R2-I10 (decomposability), R2-I11 (requirement testability), R2-I12 (background sufficiency), R2-I13 (design decision completeness), R2-I14 (boundary clarity), R2-I15 (decomposition notes quality). Each function must take (documentContent: string, additionalContext?: string) and return a string. Each prompt must instruct the LLM to return JSON with check, dimension, verdict, evidence, and summary fields. Verdict: PASS if all six are present with correct signatures and output format instructions; FAIL otherwise.
